summary: Enthusiastic first‑time listener finds the recording captivating despite limited technical details
review: The reviewer is clearly thrilled to have discovered this show as their introduction to the Dead, awarding it a perfect five‑star rating. No specific comments are made about the sound quality or musical performance, so the assessment relies on overall enthusiasm rather than concrete observations.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one highly positive review; rating reflects strong sentiment but lacks detail to assess show or recording quality confidently.
